allow: PowerShell($p = \(Get-Command pdftotext -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($p\) { "pdftotext: $\($p.Source\)" } else { "no-pdftotext" }; $py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { "python: $\($py.Source\)" } else { "no-python" })
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && make -s 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "=== build done ==="')
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && make re 2>&1 | grep -iE "error|undefined|reference|warning|md_serialize|=== |ld:" | head -30; echo "--- exit: ${PIPESTATUS[0]} ---"')
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && make re 2>&1 | grep -iE "error|undefined|warning|Stop|ld:" ; echo "--- build exit: ${PIPESTATUS[0]} ---"; ls -l ft_ssl 2>&1 | tail -1')
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && make -s re 2>&1 | grep -iE "error|warning" ; bash /tmp/ft_ssl_test.sh')
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && chmod +x tests/run_tests.sh && make -s test')
Bash(wsl -d debian -- bash -lc 'cd ~/42_ft_ssl_md5 && make -s test 2>&1 | tail -4')
